cleanRoom: Original procedural study; no official assets, code, audio, level data, branding, or screenshots.

vitest.note: One persisted JSON-reporter run; terminal wrapper detached, then worker exit and successful report were checked.

captureProtocol.server: one owned Vite server at 127.0.0.1:5175, stopped after capture
captureProtocol.contexts: Fresh system-Chrome context/page for each capture
captureProtocol.clock: Real R2 QA scenario command trace, stopped ticker, normalized controller progress, explicit render
captureProtocol.barrier: p<1 remains pre-completion transaction presentation; direct FIFO/input-lock coverage is in the one full Vitest run because the QA object has no additional mutable lock property.

nonblockingVariance: The persisted report, not the detached terminal wrapper, supplies the authoritative Vitest counts.
